title: CI Test Performance Advisory V1
description: Schema for CI_TEST_PERFORMANCE_ADVISORY_V1 — the inner payload embedded in hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext of the Claude Code / Codex CLI PreToolUse hook stdout envelope. The full stdout is: { "hookSpecificOutput": { "hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "CI_TEST_PERFORMANCE_ADVISORY_V1 {<this_schema>}" } }. This schema describes the JSON object that follows the 'CI_TEST_PERFORMANCE_ADVISORY_V1 ' prefix in additionalContext.

block.description: Always false — this hook is non-blocking (fail_open). Never set to true.

matched_paths.description: List of matched path patterns that triggered the advisory.
